Title: Retirement of WWS versions v34.0 and earlier
Description: Web Service versions v34.0 and earlier are retired in this release. Integrations calling Human_Resources or Staffing at v34.0 or below must move to a supported version before the release window.

Title: Get_Workers response adds Worker_Profile_Data element
Description: The Get_Workers operation in the Human_Resources Web Service now returns an additional Worker_Profile_Data element by default. Consumers with strict schema validation must update their XSD handling.

Title: Deprecation of Submit_Compensation_Change
Description: Submit_Compensation_Change in the Compensation Web Service is deprecated. Use Request_Compensation_Change instead. Planned removal in 2027R1.

Title: New REST workers endpoint pagination default
Description: The REST API workers endpoint changes its default page size from 100 to 50. Clients relying on the old default must pass an explicit limit parameter.

Title: New Absence Accrual Engine
Description: Introduces a new absence accrual engine with real-time balance calculations. Automatically available; existing accrual configs are unaffected.

Title: Custom report field rename impacts RaaS
Description: Custom reports using the CF_Comp_Grade calculated field must be re-saved after upgrade; RaaS consumers of report INT002_Comp_Extract may see a field rename.

Title: Payroll audit dashboard refresh
Description: The payroll audit dashboard gets a refreshed UI with drill-down. No integration surface.
